title: Smoke add environment variable
input: add a DATABASE_URL environment variable to the .env.example file with a placeholder value of postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/mydb.

requiredConstraints: add a DATABASE_URL environment variable to the .env.example file with a placeholder value of postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/mydb.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add new storage systems or background jobs while addressing “Smoke add environment variable”.
